title: Qualifying a Shipping Lane in 4 Stages
alt: Four-stage process for qualifying a pharmaceutical shipping lane

items.label: Map the lane
items.desc: Document every step and dwell point; define worst case

items.label: Profile with loggers
items.desc: Calibrated, ALCOA+ data across summer and winter extremes

items.label: Qualify the packaging
items.desc: Match shipper to worst-case duration and ambient profile

items.label: Set criteria and verify
items.desc: Pass/fail tied to stability data; confirm across runs
